toolPurpose: Retrieve blog metadata including title, description, post count, followers, and avatar for a specified blog identifier.

blog_identifier.description: Blog identifier - can be blog name (e.g., 'staff') or hostname (e.g., 'staff.tumblr.com')

toolPurpose: List blog posts with optional filtering by content type and pagination support. Returns posts in NPF (Neue Post Format) with support for multiple post types.

blog_identifier.description: Blog identifier - can be blog name (e.g., 'staff') or hostname (e.g., 'staff.tumblr.com')

type.description: Filter by post type (text, photo, quote, link, chat, audio, video)

limit.description: Number of posts to retrieve per request (default: 20, max: 50)

offset.description: Pagination offset for fetching additional posts (default: 0)

toolPurpose: Search for posts across Tumblr network by tag with pagination support. Returns tagged posts from all blogs.

limit.description: Number of posts to retrieve per request (default: 20, max: 50)

before.description: Unix timestamp to retrieve posts before this time for pagination

toolPurpose: Retrieve authenticated user's dashboard feed showing posts from followed blogs with optional filtering by content type and pagination.

limit.description: Number of posts to retrieve per request (default: 20, max: 50)

offset.description: Pagination offset for fetching additional posts (default: 0)

type.description: Filter by post type (text, photo, quote, link, chat, audio, video)

toolPurpose: List blogs followed by the authenticated user with pagination support and optional filter for blog information.

limit.description: Number of blogs to retrieve per request (default: 20, max: 50)

offset.description: Pagination offset for fetching additional blogs (default: 0)
